phase_name: Gantt UI Polish 3 — Header Align, Bar Drag-Resize, Back Button Fix, Excel-Style Task Entry

completed_tasks.name: Fix duplicate IDs on multi-item paste (in-memory maxSeq)
Cycle guard + visualOrder anchor in gridGroupIndent

remaining_tasks.name: Browser UAT: SC-1 header flush, SC-2a/b/c bar drag, SC-3 back button, SC-4 Excel-style entry
Mark Phase 86.5 complete in ROADMAP.md + STATE.md

human_actions_pending.action: Run browser UAT for Phase 86.5 (5 tests in VERIFICATION.md)
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 86.5 code is done; VERIFICATION.md at human_needed. Start python -m http.server 8000, open a project with tasks, run the 5 tests.

decisions.decision: gridGroupIndent: use visualOrder (DFS) not row_order sort for anchor search
decisions.rationale: row_order and DFS order diverge after drag/paste — visualOrder matches what user sees

decisions.decision: gridGroupDelete: call deleteTaskNow only on topmost selected IDs
decisions.rationale: deleteTaskNow cascades full subtree; calling on child+parent double-deletes and corrupts recomputeParentDates

decisions.decision: gridPasteRows: hasInternalHierarchy preserves clipboard root depth
decisions.rationale: flat selections should land at paste target depth; parent+child clipboard should preserve original depth

next_action: Guide user through Phase 86.5 browser UAT. Start dev server, navigate to project plan view, run 5 tests from VERIFICATION.md. Pass → close phase. Fail → debug.
context_notes: Phase 86.10 is fully closed (code, UAT, review, verification all done). Phase 86.5 was implemented in a prior session but UAT was skipped. It is the only remaining gap before v4.0 Gantt work is complete.
